title: The Catch
writer: Toshirô Ishidô, Toshio Matsumoto, Tsutomu Tamura
actors: Rentarô Mikuni, Akiko Koyama, Yôko Mihara
plot: Towards the end of WWII, a black American pilot is captured and imprisoned by rural Japanese villagers, who await official instructions as to how to proceed with their "catch."
